title: PMS Special Mum Memorial Heart Ornament – Polyresin Graveside Tribute with Floral Detailing & Diamantes – Thoughtful Sympathy Keepsake for Cemetery, Garden or Home – 16 x 14 cm
features: SPECIAL MUM TRIBUTE – Heart-shaped memorial ornament featuring a touching remembrance message honouring a much-loved mother.
QUALITY POLYRESIN DESIGN – Crafted from durable, weather-resistant polyresin with a natural stone-effect finish suitable for outdoor or indoor display.
FLORAL DETAIL & DIAMANTES – Features sculpted floral elements and subtle diamante accents for a gentle, elegant finish.
IDEAL SIZE FOR GRAVESIDES – Measuring 16 x 14 cm, it fits perfectly on grave plots, memorial gardens, patios, or remembrance shelves at home.
THOUGHTFUL SYMPATHY GIFT – A comforting keepsake for family or friends, offering a lasting way to honour cherished memories of a special mum.
description: Honour the memory of a beloved mother with the PMS Special Mum Memorial Heart Ornament, a beautifully crafted tribute designed to bring comfort, reflection, and lasting remembrance. Made from durable polyresin, this heart-shaped memorial stone features an inspiring message in elegant script: “In memory of a life so beautifully lived, a heart so deeply loved.” The thoughtful sentiment offers warmth and reassurance during times of loss, making it a touching addition to any graveside, garden memorial, or remembrance area at home. The ornament includes detailed floral embellishments and subtle diamantes that add a gentle sparkle when they catch the light, creating a peaceful and respectful display. Its speckled stone-effect finish gives the look of natural carved stone while providing long-lasting durability against outdoor conditions. Measuring 16 x 14 cm, it is substantial enough to stand out yet compact enough to position on grave plots, memorial gardens, patios, or indoor remembrance shelves. Whether purchased as a personal keepsake or given as a thoughtful sympathy gift, this Special Mum memorial heart serves as a meaningful reminder of the love shared and the cherished memories that remain. A beautiful way to honour a mother who will always be deeply missed and forever remembered.
